title: EIV Recipe Book Button
description: Makes the Recipe Book button toggle the item view screen from Extended ItemView (EIV).  Also adds a Recipe Book button to the Brewing Stand and the Stonecutter with the same functionality.
body:
## Description
[Extended ItemView (EIV)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eiv) is a mod that makes crafting and recipe management a breeze!  However, the vanilla Recipe Book still exists and defnitely doesn't match the usability of EIV.  This mod makes it so that the Recipe Book button toggles EIV's GUI, instead of toggling the Recipe Book GUI.

### Features:
- All Recipe Book buttons now toggle EIV's item view
- Recipe Book buttons added to Brewing Stand and Stonecutter
- Tested with EIV version 3.0.3

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!

## Credits
_This mod wouldn't be possible without [Extended ItemView (EIV)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eiv) by 2Bad4Mods._
